examples: A watch is as much an accessory as it is a timepiece.
This cool timepiece was inspired by Salvador Dalí's creative art.
Rado went white for winter with their latest timepiece, the Rado Ceramica white Watch.
But on a recent morning, he was wearing only one timepiece: a simple Swatch.
Constructed by London watchmaker John Jefferys, the watch turns out to be Harrison's breakthrough timepiece.
